---
title: "Example Quarto + ggalttext"
format:
   typst:
      keep-typ: true
---

```{r}
ggalttext::enable_auto_alt_text()
```

## Hello world

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(babynames)

babynames <- babynames |> dplyr::filter(name %in% c("Mary", "Anna", "Emma"))

ggplot(babynames, aes(x = year, y = n, group = name, fill = name)) +
    geom_area() +
    labs(title = "Popularity of American names")
```

## Yet another chart


```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = cyl)) +
    geom_point()
```
